rulings.Case Title: BURLINGAME INVESTMENT CORPORATION et al VS. HERMAN KWAI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons On Deft For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction

rulings.Case Title: BURLINGAME INVESTMENT CORPORATION et al VS. HERMAN KWAI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant(S) Chinin Tana, Jeffrey Chang And Michael Choy'S Motion For Relief Under Ccp 473(B) As Per Recusal Of Judge Busch.
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 29, 2009, line 9, Defendant Chinin Tana, Jeffrey Chang and Michael Choy's Motion for Relief under CCP 473(b) as per recusal of Judge Busch. Motion for relief under CCP section 473(b) is denied. Defendants fail to show excusable neglect under reasonable person standard. Court considered all papers before ruling on the motion on the merits. See Ambrose vs. Michelin North America, Inc. (2005) 134 Cal.App. 4th 1350. =(302/CWW/AY)

rulings.Case Title: THOMASEN MORALES VS. NELSON C TOLENTINO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Under Default Under Ccp 473(B)
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 29, 2009, line 10, DEFENDANT NELSON TOLENTINO'S Motion For Relief From Under Default Under CCP 473(b). Motion is denied. Defendant fails to show that he exercised such reasonable diligence as a man of ordinary prudence usually bestows upon important business. No showing of mistake, inadvertence, surprise or excusable neglect. CCP section 473(b). =(302/CWW/VC)
